case_title: ANNETTE BURRUS VS. AIDS HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORTING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURRUS, ANNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT AIDS HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION DBA OUT OF THE CLOSET

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURRUS, ANNETTE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH AND WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE BURRUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIDS HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION DBA OUT OF THE CLOSET IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHANTAL SMITH, DISTRICT MANAGER AND MARCIA MARTINEZ, STORE MANAGER. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS THAT THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING; PLAINTIFF REQUEST'S THAT THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT AIDS HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION DBA OUT OF THE CLOSET BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIDS HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION DBA OUT OF THE CLOSET

ORDER CASE AGANIST AIDS HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. CAST AGAINST TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BURRUS, ANNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT AIDS HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION DBA OUT OF THE CLOSET TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
